  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Receptionist",
  "description": "Axari Hotel &amp; Suites is a premium hospitality destination committed to delivering comfort, luxury, and exceptional service. Strategically located in Calabar, we provide a serene and secure environment tailored to meet the needs of both business and leisure travelers.

Our hotel features elegantly designed rooms, modern facilities, and top-tier amenities that ensure every guest enjoys a memorable stay. From our well-equipped event halls to our refined dining experience, Axari Hotel &amp; Suites is dedicated to excellence in every detail.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location:&nbsp;Calabar, Cross River&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are urgently recruiting a qualified graduate for the position of Receptionist. Applicants must reside in Calabar and be ready for immediate employment.


Interview Date
20th April, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application and CV to:&nbsp;axarihotel.reservations@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
And
Submit a hard copy of your CV at:
Axari Hotel &amp; Suite,
Murtala Muhammed Highway,
off Zone 6, by Winners way,&nbsp;",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-20",

Receptionist Job at Axari Hotel & Suites




        
    

        
        Axari Hotel & Suites is a premium hospitality destination committed to delivering comfort, luxury, and exceptional service. Strategically located in Calabar, we provide a serene and secure environment tailored to meet the needs of both business and leisure travelers.

Our hotel features elegantly designed rooms, modern facilities, and top-tier amenities that ensure every guest enjoys a memorable stay. From our well-equipped event halls to our refined dining experience, Axari Hotel & Suites is dedicated to excellence in every detail.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location: Calabar, Cross River 
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary


	We are urgently recruiting a qualified graduate for the position of Receptionist. Applicants must reside in Calabar and be ready for immediate employment.


Interview Date
20th April, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application and CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
And
Submit a hard copy of your CV at:
Axari Hotel & Suite,
Murtala Muhammed Highway,
off Zone 6, by Winners way,     

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Market Access Manager",
  "description": "Codix Pharma Limited is a healthtech company who specializes in providing health technology solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Market Access Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos Mainland, Lagos

Responsibilities


	Write proposals / concepts notes to, and work with different departments, agencies in line with our product offerings.
	Promote and sell our products to healthcare professionals, nutritionists, corporate organizations, and individuals.
	Keep current with the demand and supply of the company&rsquo;s products/services, economic indicators, changing trends, and competitors.
	Work with all Agencies (International &amp; Local) for shaping government policies, drive products acceptability and procurements.
	Develop and implement tactics in line with the strategic business plan and forecasts to achieve corporate objectives for products.
	Establish and maintain strong relationship with chain stores (e.g. Medplus, One Health Pharmacy, etc.) to drive sales growth.
	Work closely with the leadership team (Where possible) and other departments in the organizations such as Marketing and Commercial/Regulatory Affairs, Logistics Departments to ensure overall objectives of the organization.
	Administer allocated budget effectively to achieve sales targets, analyse ROI on sales initiatives.
	Stay appropriately networked and keep abreast of trends, news, procurement, and deadlines within both Government, healthcare and Private sectors so that all possible, new or enhanced opportunities are adequately utilized.
	Establish and maintain relationships with industry influencers and key strategic partners.
	Identifying and establishing new businesses.


Requirements


	BSc in Pharmacology, Biochemistry, Biological Sciences, or any other science related discipline
	Cognate work experience
	Excellent communication, presentation, and analytical skills Strategic and the ability to develop good relations with customers
	Strong leadership skill
	Proficient computer skills and data/information management capability.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;recruit4pharm@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-16",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "CODIX Pharma Limited"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",

      "addressCountry": "NG"

Market Access Manager Job at Codix Pharma Limited




        
    

        
        Codix Pharma Limited is a healthtech company who specializes in providing health technology solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Market Access Manager

Job Location: Lagos Mainland, Lagos

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Write proposals / concepts notes to, and work with different departments, agencies in line with our product offerings.
	Promote and sell our products to healthcare professionals, nutritionists, corporate organizations, and individuals.
	Keep current with the demand and supply of the company’s products/services, economic indicators, changing trends, and competitors.
	Work with all Agencies (International & Local) for shaping government policies, drive products acceptability and procurements.
	Develop and implement tactics in line with the strategic business plan and forecasts to achieve corporate objectives for products.
	Establish and maintain strong relationship with chain stores (e.g. Medplus, One Health Pharmacy, etc.) to drive sales growth.
	Work closely with the leadership team (Where possible) and other departments in the organizations such as Marketing and Commercial/Regulatory Affairs, Logistics Departments to ensure overall objectives of the organization.
	Administer allocated budget effectively to achieve sales targets, analyse ROI on sales initiatives.
	Stay appropriately networked and keep abreast of trends, news, procurement, and deadlines within both Government, healthcare and Private sectors so that all possible, new or enhanced opportunities are adequately utilized.
	Establish and maintain relationships with industry influencers and key strategic partners.
	Identifying and establishing new businesses.


Requirements


	BSc in Pharmacology, Biochemistry, Biological Sciences, or any other science related discipline
	Cognate work experience
	Excellent communication, presentation, and analytical skills Strategic and the ability to develop good relations with customers
	Strong leadership skill
	Proficient computer skills and data/information management capability.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Consumer Health Executive",
  "description": "Codix Pharma Limited is a healthtech company who specializes in providing health technology solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Consumer Health Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Across Nigeria
Job Type: Temporary

Responsibilities


	Presenting products to healthcare staff including doctors, nurses, and pharmacies.
	Build and maintain positive working relationships with medical staff and supporting administrative staff.
	Host activations / group meetings as scheduled.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Minimum of OND&nbsp;qualification in any science related field.
	Minimum of 1 year of experience in Medical Sales.
	Ability to communicate in English and local dialect.
	Knowledge of MS Office particularly Excel, and Word.
	Good communication, negotiation, sales, presentation, and skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Consumer Health Executive Job at Codix Pharma Limited




        
    

        
        Codix Pharma Limited is a healthtech company who specializes in providing health technology solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Consumer Health Executive

Job Location: Across Nigeria
Job Type: Temporary

Responsibilities


	Presenting products to healthcare staff including doctors, nurses, and pharmacies.
	Build and maintain positive working relationships with medical staff and supporting administrative staff.
	Host activations / group meetings as scheduled.


Qualifications and Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

	Minimum of 1 year of experience in Medical Sales.
	Ability to communicate in English and local dialect.
	Knowledge of MS Office particularly Excel, and Word.
	Good communication, negotiation, sales, presentation, and skills.


Method of Application

	We are seeking a smart, proactive, and highly organized Office/Personal Assistant to support daily operations.

	Provide administrative and personal support to management
	Manage schedules, appointments, and meetings
	Handle correspondence, emails, and office documentation
	Assist with travel arrangements and logistics

	Good knowledge of Abuja (routes, locations, and general navigation)
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other basic computer applications
	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Ability to multitask and work under pressure
	Must be familiar with Abuja.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Office / Personal Assistant Job at Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited




        
    

        
        Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited is amining company engaged in the exploration, mining, and processing of lithium. With a strong presence across the country, the company operates branches in Lagos, Abuja, and Nasarawa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office / Personal Assistant
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a smart, proactive, and highly organized Office/Personal Assistant to support daily operations.


Key Responsibilities

	Provide administrative and personal support to management

	Maintain records and ensure proper filing systems

	Must be smart, active, and detail-oriented
	Good knowledge of Abuja (routes, locations, and general navigation)

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Manager - Food & Beverage",
  "description": "Prestigious Consulting is a professional HR consultancy firm. We focus on improving organizational performance through strategic people &amp; process management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager - Food &amp; Beverage

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;(Hybrid / Remote Working Options)
Department: Food &amp; Beverage

About the Role


	We are seeking a results-driven Project Manager to lead end-to-end product development and commercialization projects within the food and beverage space.
	This is not a routine technical role. It is a client-facing, execution-focused position that combines project management, product development oversight, regulatory coordination, and commercial delivery.
	You will lead projects across the full lifecycle&mdash;from concept and formulation through scale-up, regulatory approval, and market launch&mdash;ensuring timely, high-quality, and commercially viable outcomes for clients across the beverage industry.


Key Responsibilities
Project Leadership &amp; Delivery:


	Lead and manage end-to-end beverage product development projects from concept to launch
	Define project scope, timelines, deliverables, and resource allocation
	Track progress, manage risks, and ensure on-time, on-budget delivery
	Coordinate cross-functional teams (R&amp;D, production, regulatory, marketing)
	Serve as the primary point of contact for clients and stakeholders


Beverage Product Development Oversight:


	Oversee formulation and development of beverage products (e.g. juices, carbonated drinks, dairy, functional beverages)
	Guide product testing, sensory evaluation, and prototype validation
	Ensure product quality, consistency, and scalability
	Identify cost optimization opportunities without compromising product standards


Regulatory &amp; Compliance Management:


	Ensure compliance with NAFDAC, SON, Codex Alimentarius, and relevant standards
	Coordinate product registration, labelling approvals, and documentation
	Oversee implementation of HACCP, GMP, and ISO 22000 standards
	Conduct compliance checks and mitigate regulatory risks


Manufacturing &amp; Scale-Up Coordination:


	Support transition from pilot production to full-scale manufacturing
	Coordinate process design and production readiness with manufacturing teams
	Oversee development of SOPs for production, quality control, and operations
	Monitor production efficiency and recommend improvements


Client &amp; Stakeholder Management:


	Lead client engagements and manage expectations throughout project lifecycle
	Translate technical outputs into clear business and commercial recommendations
	Support proposals, presentations, and project reporting
	Ensure delivery of high-quality outcomes aligned with client objectives


Commercial &amp; Go-To-Market Support


	Support product positioning and go-to-market strategies
	Validate product claims in line with regulatory standards
	Collaborate with marketing teams on product launch execution.


Team Coordination &amp; Knowledge Management:


	Work closely with internal technical teams and external partners
	Document project learnings, frameworks, and best practices
	Support mentoring of junior team members where required.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Food Science, Food Technology, Chemical Engineering, or related field
	4&ndash;6 years&rsquo; experience in beverage product development, manufacturing, or project management
	Proven experience managing end-to-end product development or innovation projects
	Strong understanding of beverage formulations, processing, and scale-up operations
	Experience working with regulatory frameworks (NAFDAC, HACCP, GMP, ISO 22000)
	Experience in FMCG, beverage companies, or consulting environments is highly preferred.


Technical &amp; Core Competencies:


	Strong project management and execution skills
	Knowledge of beverage formulation and production processes
	Excellent stakeholder and client management ability
	Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset
	Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines
	High attention to detail and regulatory discipline
	Commercial awareness and results orientation.


Why Join Us


	Lead high-impact beverage innovation and commercialization projects
	Work in a fast-paced, growth-driven consulting environment
	Exposure to diverse clients across the food and beverage industry
	Opportunity to drive real market impact from concept to launch.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@prestigiousconsultinggroup.ng&nbsp;using &quot;Project Manager - Food &amp; Beverage&quot; as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-15",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-30",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Prestigious Consulting"
    
  },

Project Manager - Food & Beverage Job at Prestigious Consulting




        
    

        
        Prestigious Consulting is a professional HR consultancy firm. We focus on improving organizational performance through strategic people & process management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager - Food & Beverage

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid / Remote Working Options)
Department: Food & Beverage

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a results-driven Project Manager to lead end-to-end product development and commercialization projects within the food and beverage space.
	This is not a routine technical role. It is a client-facing, execution-focused position that combines project management, product development oversight, regulatory coordination, and commercial delivery.
	You will lead projects across the full lifecycle—from concept and formulation through scale-up, regulatory approval, and market launch—ensuring timely, high-quality, and commercially viable outcomes for clients across the beverage industry.


Key Responsibilities
Project Leadership & Delivery:


	Lead and manage end-to-end beverage product development projects from concept to launch
	Define project scope, timelines, deliverables, and resource allocation
	Track progress, manage risks, and ensure on-time, on-budget delivery
	Coordinate cross-functional teams (R&D, production, regulatory, marketing)
	Serve as the primary point of contact for clients and stakeholders


Beverage Product Development Oversight:


	Oversee formulation and development of beverage products (e.g. juices, carbonated drinks, dairy, functional beverages)
	Guide product testing, sensory evaluation, and prototype validation
	Ensure product quality, consistency, and scalability
	Identify cost optimization opportunities without compromising product standards


Regulatory & Compliance Management:


	Ensure compliance with NAFDAC, SON, Codex Alimentarius, and relevant standards
	Coordinate product registration, labelling approvals, and documentation
	Oversee implementation of HACCP, GMP, and ISO 22000 standards
	Conduct compliance checks and mitigate regulatory risks


Manufacturing & Scale-Up Coordination:


	Support transition from pilot production to full-scale manufacturing
	Coordinate process design and production readiness with manufacturing teams
	Oversee development of SOPs for production, quality control, and operations
	Monitor production efficiency and recommend improvements


Client & Stakeholder Management:


	Lead client engagements and manage expectations throughout project lifecycle
	Translate technical outputs into clear business and commercial recommendations
	Support proposals, presentations, and project reporting
	Ensure delivery of high-quality outcomes aligned with client objectives


Commercial & Go-To-Market Support


	Support product positioning and go-to-market strategies
	Validate product claims in line with regulatory standards
	Collaborate with marketing teams on product launch execution.


Team Coordination & Knowledge Management:


	Work closely with internal technical teams and external partners
	Document project learnings, frameworks, and best practices
	Support mentoring of junior team members where required.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree in Food Science, Food Technology, Chemical Engineering, or related field
	4–6 years’ experience in beverage product development, manufacturing, or project management
	Proven experience managing end-to-end product development or innovation projects
	Strong understanding of beverage formulations, processing, and scale-up operations
	Experience working with regulatory frameworks (NAFDAC, HACCP, GMP, ISO 22000)
	Experience in FMCG, beverage companies, or consulting environments is highly preferred.


Technical & Core Competencies:


	Strong project management and execution skills
	Knowledge of beverage formulation and production processes
	Excellent stakeholder and client management ability
	Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset
	Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines
	High attention to detail and regulatory discipline
	Commercial awareness and results orientation.


Why Join Us


	Lead high-impact beverage innovation and commercialization projects
	Work in a fast-paced, growth-driven consulting environment
	Exposure to diverse clients across the food and beverage industry
	Opportunity to drive real market impact from concept to launch.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Project Manager - Food & Beverage" as the subject of the email.
